slides.title: A whiter smile starts *with your gums*.
slides.sub: Strips bleach the surface. Pink, healthy gums and less staining are what actually read as 'clean'.

slides.title: Healthy gums frame the teeth
slides.body: Puffy, red gums make teeth look dingy. *Floss daily* and the whole smile looks brighter — for free.

slides.title: Water beats a quick brush
slides.body: Coffee, wine and dark soda stain. *Sip water after* and swish — it clears pigment before it sets.

slides.title: Sugar feeds the dull film
slides.body: Sugar feeds the bacteria behind plaque and that yellow film. *Less added sugar* keeps enamel clearer.

slides.title: Don't scrub enamel away
slides.body: Thin enamel shows the yellow underneath. Skip charcoal scrubs — *soft brush, gentle pressure* protects the white.

slides.title: Stop the night-time dry mouth
slides.body: Saliva is your enamel's defense. Booze and mouth-breathing dry it out — *hydrate and sleep well* to keep it flowing.

slides.title: Brighter smile, *from healthy habits*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the water, sugar & sleep behind a clean, bright smile — in one daily score.

caption:
A whiter smile is less about strips and more about pink gums and less staining. 🦷

Floss daily, rinse after coffee, cut the sugar, go easy on the enamel, fix the night-time dry mouth. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health tracks the water, sugar & sleep behind a clean smile → link in bio.
youtube_title: A Whiter Smile Starts With Your Gums

bg_prompts.cover: Black-and-white cinematic editorial beauty portrait. Dramatic low-key Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, dark charcoal background. Glowing dewy skin with fine realistic texture, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look. Single subject, calm confident mood. No text, no logos, no props. Vertical composition with the subject toward the upper half so the lower third falls into darkness. A person with a relaxed, confident closed-lip-to-soft smile and clean healthy teeth, soft light on the mouth and jaw.
